programmes.show_description: From North To South America. From a Houston joint's Argentinian empanadas to street tacos in Cancun, Mexico, Guy Fieri digs into flavours spanning the Americas. S26, Ep8
Goin' International. Guy Fieri grabs gangster global grub such as oxtail and curry goat from a Jamaican joint in Houston, and a 24-hour burrito hot spot in Cancun, Mexico. S26, Ep9
Kansas City. Adam Richman is in Kansas City for some world-class barbecue, some of the best pan-fried chicken in the USA and the six-pound Ultimate Destroyer sandwich! S2, Ep30
Indianapolis. Foodie Adam Richman is in Indianapolis, Indiana, for the Indy staple pork tenderloin sandwich, some Hoosier home cooking and the enormous Big Ugly Burger Challenge. S2, Ep31
Peppermint & A Polar Bear Plunge. Buddy bakes a yummy cake for the Coney Island Polar Bear Club and is invited to take an icy winter swim with them. But will he take the plunge? S3, Ep6
Tournament Of Knights & A Tasty Tiramisu. The team are asked to make a cake for the King of Medieval Times and Buddy channels his father when he makes an old-school tiramisu. S3, Ep7

Bologna. Adam's in Bologna tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including Bolognese sauce and a sweet made with rice and almonds. S1, Ep7
Naples. Adam's in Naples tasting iconic foods named after this city, including the classic Napolitina pizza and a pasta dish called spaghetti alle vongole. S1, Ep8
A trip around the Baltic wouldn't be complete without the Bikers tasting the best of Sweden on a plate with a smorgasbord. And, they cook classic Swedish meatballs with wild boar! S1, Ep6
Dinner On The Grill. Ree makes a Mexican-inspired family dinner on the grill. On the menu are marinated carne asada with skewers of chipotle glazed shrimp and corn and squash salad. S25, Ep5
Home Sweet Home: Easy Eats. Ree cooks easy eats with her kids, including wafflewiches using turkey bacon and roast beef, shortcut homemade ravioli and an omelette in a mug. S25, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Jamie turns the humble aubergine into something incredible with his Milanese. Then he makes Cajun-spiced salmon tacos with a mango salsa. S1, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Jamie shares shortcuts for a prosciutto-wrapped roasted pork fillet served with a cheesy gnocchi gratin. Plus, he whips up a beautiful prawn curry. S1, Ep12
Old School Retro Mix. Ina takes a trip down memory lane and updates some classic recipes. She cooks a meatloaf with chef Kevin Penner and modernises a smoked salmon devilled eggs. S4, Ep5
Easy French. Ina visits the legendary chef, Daniel Boulud, at his flagship restaurant in New York. Together they create one of his delicious, signature, classic, French dishes. S4, Ep6
The remaining bakers make their own versions of hearty British pies. Then judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood will decide who will be the final three to go through to the final. S1, Ep5
It is the Grand Final and the three surviving contestants must bake for the afternoon tea party. Who will be crowned the Great British Bake Off's Best Amateur Baker? S1, Ep6
James sails into the French port of Marseilles in search of the famous fish stew, bouillabaisse. He explores its North African quarter and cooks a lamb tagine. S1, Ep5
James is in Gaeta on Italy's Lazio coast. He finds out how they produce world class olives and tries local speciality, pizza pie. Plus, he serves up veal escalope and carbonara. S1, Ep6
James visits Elounda in Crete, where discovers its local baking traditions. Plus, he prepares olive-crusted lamb pancakes and potato cake with feta and sardines. S1, Ep7
James sails into Valencia, Spain and visits its famous market. He discovers the secret to making paella, tucks into tapas and serves up butternut squash with almond soup. S1, Ep8

Mary prepares simple yet scrumptious dishes to satisfy the whole family. Her menu includes a light tuna salad with avocado and lemon mustard dressing. S1, Ep4
Wonder Women. Guy Fieri visits all-female line-ups in Houston and Orlando. A grandma serves up family recipes like homemade tamales, and he checks out a funky meatball spot. S26, Ep10
Multicultural Cooking. Guy Fieri digs into the gastronomic traditions of different cultures including a Mexican joint in Houston and a Jewish deli-on-wheels in Orlando, Florida. S26, Ep11

Jersey Shore. Adam is at the Jersey Shore checking out a Trenton-style tomato pie and mighty octopus-shaped ice cream sundae. Then, he tries an insanely spicy wing-eating challenge. S2, Ep32
Syracuse. Adam Richman is in Syracuse, NY, checking out some serious grub. He tries the pork-sket sandwich at a biker BBQ joint. Then he takes on a monumental frittata challenge. S2, Ep33
6-Foot Sub Sandwich, Zeppoles & A Sick Mauro. There is a hero at the bakery and it's not Buddy, but rather a mega Six-Foot Hero Sandwich Cake for a local deli's 100th birthday party. S3, Ep10

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Fast And Fresh. Tom gets a delivery of Isle of Wight tomatoes for an iconic dish that is back on the menu. Plus, she shares three fast, fresh dishes to cook at home. S2, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Spice Route. In the pub, a traditional shepherd's pie is given an Indian twist. Plus, Tom cooks lamb curry, Thai fishcakes and spiced pineapple tarte tatin. S2, Ep8
Dave Myers and Si King explore the food of the American South. They start in Memphis, Tennessee, where they try iconic Southern dishes: a soul stew and fried chicken. S1, Ep1
Tailgate Get-Togethers. Ree makes easy food on the ranch, with a roasted Greek salad. Then, she stir-fries sesame noodles with mushrooms and makes fried mozzarella bites. S25, Ep7
Home Sweet Home: Italian-ish. Ree cooks up ranch-style Italian helped by her kid crew. There's chicken Florentine mac and cheese, and squash spaghetti for a healthy bolognese. S25, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Mushroom Soup/Cauliflower Remoulade. Jamie takes mushrooms to a whole new level with his deliciously cheesy baked mushroom soup. Plus, he makes a stunning cauliflower remoulade. S1, Ep13

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Jamie cooks his incredible avocado pastry quiche, with a delicious cheesy and basil filling. Plus, he shares how to take steak to the next level. S1, Ep14

Easy Desserts. Ina makes easy sweet treats like her delicious fruit-filled cranberry and apple cake. Plus, she gets a dessert masterclass from pastry chef, Claudia Fleming. S4, Ep8
12 of the UK's best amateur bakers compete to be crowned the Great British Bake Off champion. The technical challenge sees them all making a coffee and walnut Battenberg cake. S2, Ep1

James Martin sails into Chania, Crete, to explore the local markets and pick out some traditional produce. On the menu is his version of chicken souvlaki. S1, Ep9
Chef James Martin arrives in Minori on Italy's stunning Amalfi coast. During his trip, James learns how to make delicious fresh pasta and shares a beautiful recipe. S1, Ep10

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: James is in Virginia to learn the secrets of an all-American classic, the apple pie. Then, he heads to the kitchen to make his own apple crumble cake. S1, Ep1
